scope.goal: Create a new mobile-first homepage UI for SEN Snap anchored around #7AC796.
scope.audience: SENCOs and SEN support staff using phones during the school day.
scope.primaryTask: Understand the product in under 20 seconds and navigate to login quickly.

brandConstraints.spacing: comfortable touch spacing and clear vertical rhythm

functionalRequirements: Visible interaction states for key controls
Realistic copy with no lorem ipsum
contentConstraints: Use SEN-focused language and realistic sentence lengths
Include concrete micro-metrics and actionable copy
